body_preview: - Graph pressure row #4: transcript_only_failed_tool_count=2 — recent transcripts contained failed tool actions absent from state events. - Graph pressure row #5: state_only_failed_tool_count=36 — state events contained failed tool actions without matching transcript entries. - Assessment bug #1 [MEDIUM]: "36 state events show tool failures without matching
expected_evidence: Next trajectory snapshot shows labels like `state_only_failed_tool_count=36 (bash_tool_error=12, edit_file_error=8, ...)` instead of just the count. title: Surface state/transcript tool failure mismatch labels in trajectory output
